BearerAuth.description: Preferred client token. Accepts API_BEARER_TOKEN during migration or a signed OAuth/Entra JWT when OAuth configuration is complete.

info.description: FastAPI edge for the Flutter-facing LALA-next contract.

X-LALA-Cache-Key.description: Opaque client-safe generation cache key derived from the request hash.

X-LALA-Request-Hash.description: Deterministic SHA-256 hash of the normalized generation request.

X-Request-ID.description: Safe request correlation id generated or accepted by the API.
